description: Canonical human/machine-readable discovery catalog for GENtle tutorials. Source units generate both this discovery catalog and the executable tutorial runtime manifest.

entries.title: GENtle Tutorial (Generated)
entries.notes: Generated from docs/tutorial/sources plus executable workflows; validated by tutorial-check.

entries.title: VKORC1 / rs9923231 PGx Alert -> Mammalian Luciferase Reporter (GUI Tutorial with Matching CLI Commands)
entries.notes: Hand-written GUI-first tutorial for turning the VKORC1/rs9923231 pharmacogenomic alert into one mammalian promoter-reporter planning workflow with explicit engine and CLI mapping.

entries.title: Retrieve a cDNA and Compare It Against the Genomic Sequence (Dotplot Tutorial)
entries.notes: Screenshot-backed manual tutorial for cDNA-vs-genomic comparison.

entries.title: Gibson Specialist Testing Tutorial
entries.notes: Hands-on test script for the destination-first Gibson specialist with shared CLI parity.

entries.title: Gibson Arrangements Tutorial
entries.notes: Hands-on walkthrough for Gibson-created arrangements, lane inspection, and arrangement-level gel export.

entries.title: Gibson Physical Rack Tutorial
entries.notes: Hands-on walkthrough for turning one arrangement-ready Gibson result into a linked physical rack, README-grade isometric SVG, carrier labels, and OpenSCAD export.

entries.title: Confirm a Construct from an Imported Sequencing Trace (CLI Tutorial)
entries.notes: Hands-on local walkthrough for seq-trace import, trace-aware seq-confirm run, and shared report export.

entries.title: Inspect an Imported Sequencing Trace and Confirm a Construct (GUI Tutorial)
entries.notes: GUI-first walkthrough for raw trace import, baseline-aware confirmation, chromatogram inspection, and lineage reopen.

entries.title: Batch-Compare cDNA FASTA.GZ Samples for One Target Gene (CLI Tutorial)
entries.notes: Hands-on batch workflow for interpreting many gzipped cDNA FASTA files, aligning saved reports, and exporting one target-gene cohort sample sheet.

entries.title: GENtle Tutorial Landscape Overview
entries.notes: Graphical overview of current tutorial dependencies, roadmap-grounded additions, and heuristic human-feedback intensity.

entries.title: GENtle Agent Interfaces Tutorial
entries.notes: Conceptual and operational guide for GUI assistant, CLI/shared shell, MCP, and external coding agents.

entries.title: Prepare a Metabion Handoff from Shared External-Service Contracts
entries.notes: Safe handoff rehearsal for Metabion oligo and m-block requests through the shared provider catalog, preflight, and quote bundle contracts; no vendor submission.

entries.title: Prepare a GeneArt Handoff from Shared External-Service Contracts
entries.notes: Safe GeneArt cloned-gene and protein-expression quote-handoff rehearsal through the shared provider catalog, preflight, quote bundle, and return_spec contracts; no vendor submission.

entries.title: Simple PCR From a Selected Core Region
entries.notes: Beginner-friendly selection-first PCR walkthrough centered on core ROI, maximum primer distance from the core, and maximum amplicon length.

entries.title: Transcript-Native Protein Expert Sanity Check
entries.notes: Local-first manual check for transcript-native Protein Expert opening, provenance visibility, and derived-only SVG export.

entries.title: Reverse Translate an Imported Protein and Audit the Result
entries.notes: GUI-first manual check for Ensembl protein import, reverse translation, provenance inspection, and lineage reopen.

entries.title: Promoter Design for VKORC1 / rs9923231
entries.notes: Shortest GUI path for the current ClawBio-facing story: start from the dbSNP marker, drive the dedicated Promoter design window, and export one portable promoter-reporter handoff bundle.

entries.title: Audit a TP73 UniProt Projection Against Ensembl and Derived Coding Sequence (CLI Tutorial)
entries.notes: CLI-first walkthrough for the integrated TP73 UniProt/Ensembl projection audit, the reusable low-level primitives, parity comparison, and the unsent maintainer-email draft.

entries.title: qPCR Across Exon Junctions
entries.notes: GUI-first walkthrough for seeding shared-transcript or transcript-specific qPCR from Splicing Expert, including junction-only transcript evidence and shared-shell parity commands.
